prestazioni: 8.4L V10 (SRT Engine Code: 8.4L V10 206 CID) stroked to 8.8L with forged internals from JE Pistons (9.0:1 compression, 102.5mm bore, 106mm stroke) and billet crankshaft by Callies Performance Products, paired with Manley titanium intake/exhaust valves and upgraded valve springs for 8,500 RPM redline capability

Custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (1.15 A/R turbine housing) with a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate, intercooled via a PWR USA dual-core bar-and-plate intercooler (1,200 CFM airflow) and fed by dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps with ID1700x injectors, all managed by a Motec M150 ECU with Viper-specific CAN bus integration

Full bolt-on ACR Extreme Aero chassis reinforcement: Tube Technologies Inc. (TTI) chromoly subframe connectors, BMR Suspension adjustable sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear), and Ohlins TTX46 coilovers with 12-position rebound damping and 20mm of ride height adjustment, paired with Viper-specific spherical bearing control arms from Speedtech Performance
estetica: Full carbon fiber Extreme Aero widebody conversion by Prefix Corporation (OEM Viper ACR supplier), including extended front fenders (2.5" wider), rear quarter panels (3.0" wider), and a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated Gurney flap (tested in SRT’s wind tunnel for 1,200 lbs of downforce at 150 mph)

Custom front splitter by Anderson Composites with adjustable dive planes (carbon fiber, 3-piece design for modular angle adjustment) and a Viper-specific rear wing from APR Performance (GTC-300 model, 30" chord, 72" span, 3D-printed aluminum endplates with vortex generators)

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified), Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a Viper-specific roll cage by Autopower Industries (1.75" x .120" DOM tubing, bolt-in design with integrated harness bar), finished with a custom Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede thumb grips)
